//: AGENT-PAY-2 — a RECORDED x402/USDC settlement RESPONSE, authored against the x402 SettlementResponse + PaymentRequirements shapes (coinbase/x402 specs/x402-specification-v1.md §5.1/§5.3). The gateway must EXTRACT the paid amount FROM this response and meter it into the SAME cross-rail cap as the Stripe rail (cross-rail summing). USDC has 6 decimals, so x402 amounts are ATOMIC units: the `requirements.maxAmountRequired` here is 1500000 atomic = 1.50 USDC = 150 cents — the extraction must convert atomic-USDC→cents, NOT read a transcript-supplied cost_cents. network=base-sepolia marks this as TESTNET (no mainnet money).
//extract: the amount the cross-rail counter meters = maxAmountRequired (1500000 atomic USDC, 6 decimals) → 1.50 USDC → 150 cents; the receipt must name the settlement tx 0x1234… so a stranger re-derives the metered cost from the recorded rail response (NOT a transcript cost_cents). asset is the canonical base-sepolia USDC contract.
